Auto-answer a sidecar request when policy permits

Source: R/sidecar.R
sidecar_respond.Rd

Matches a request against the policy table; if EVERY question is auto-answerable, optionally writes the runner's response file (selecting only options the agent was offered) and an audit-log line. Otherwise it writes nothing and the request escalates to a human.

Usage

sidecar_respond(
  request,
  response_file = NULL,
  policy = sidecar_policy(),
  apply = FALSE,
  log_file = NULL
)

Arguments

request

A request file path, or a parsed request list.

response_file

Where to write the response JSON when apply = TRUE.

policy

A policy table from sidecar_policy().

apply

Actually write the response/log (default FALSE = dry run).

log_file

Append an audit record here when an answer is written.

Value

The nli_sidecar_decision (with request_file and applied).
